description: Verso (original use): Fragment of a legal document in Arabic script, referring to a period of one year (mudda sana kāmila) and a drug store (fī dukkān al-ʿiṭr). Might be related to the Judaeo-Arabic partnership agreement on recto.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
